DP.559.0035:
Stepping on this Trap sends the
victim flying upward.
DP.559.0036:
Stepping on this Trap sends the
victim flying to the right.
DP.559.0037:
Stepping on this Trap sends the
victim flying downward.
DP.559.0038:
Stepping on this Trap sends the
victim flying to the left.
DP.559.0039:
Stepping on this Trap sends the
victim flying far upward.
DP.559.0040:
Stepping on this Trap sends the
victim flying far to the right.
DP.559.0041:
Stepping on this Trap sends the
victim flying far downward.
DP.559.0042:
Stepping on this Trap sends the
victim flying far to the left.
DP.559.0043:
Stepping on this Trap warps the
victim far away.
DP.559.0044:
Stepping on this Trap warps the
victim far, far away.
DP.559.0045:
A pit opens up underneath the Trap
to immobilize the victim.
DP.559.0046:
A huge pit opens up underneath the
Trap to immobilize the victim.
DP.559.0047:
Stepping on this Trap reverses the
victim’s movements.
DP.559.0048:
Stepping on this Trap scrambles the
victim’s movements.
DP.559.0049:
Stepping on this Trap makes the
victim run.
DP.559.0050:
Stepping on this Trap makes the
victim invisible.
DP.559.0051:
Stepping on this Trap slows the
victim’s foot speed.
DP.559.0052:
A Trap that releases obscuring smoke.
The smoke can be rubbed away.
DP.559.0053:
A Trap that releases billowing smoke.
The smoke can be rubbed away.
DP.559.0054:
A Trap that makes blocking boulders.
Break the boulders to get free.
DP.559.0055:
A Trap that makes Big Boulders.
Break the boulders to get free.
DP.559.0056:
A Trap that releases bubbles.
Pop the bubbles to get free.
DP.559.0057:
A Trap that releases a mass of
bubbles. Pop them to get free.
DP.559.0058:
Stepping on this Trap sends 
greetings to everyone near you.
DP.559.0059:
Stepping on this Trap sends
farewells to everyone near you.
DP.559.0060:
Stepping on this Trap tells all nearby
that you are going to the Union Room.
DP.559.0061:
Stepping on this Trap alerts everyone
to gather around you.
DP.559.0062:
This Trap releases immobilizing leaves.
Blow the leaves away to get free.
DP.559.0063:
This Trap releases many flowers.
Blow the flowers away to get free.
DP.559.0064:
This Trap releases immobilizing embers.
Blow the embers away to get free.
DP.559.0065:
This Trap releases billowing flames.
Blow the flames away to get free.
DP.559.0066:
Stepping on this renders the Radar
useless for a while.
DP.559.0067:
A single-use drill to drill a hole in
the wall for your Secret Base.
